mapper.insert:
SELECT community_seq.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO community(communityno, cat_no, memberno, nickname, cateno, title, content, passwd, word, rdate) VALUES(#{communityno}, #{cat_no}, #{memberno}, #{nickname}, #{cateno}, #{title}, #{content}, #{passwd}, #{word, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate)
mapper.update: UPDATE community SET viewcnt = viewcnt + 1 WHERE communityno = #{communityno}
